entry.title: Re: Hana\Logs 99%
entry.content: Thanks for the answer.

entry.title: Run Revenue recognition - Projects job - Is it possible to run the job and post in the 2 ledgers
entry.content:
In app Run Revenue recognition projects, We would like to run the job for ledger 0L & 2L at the same time. At the moment, we can select only one ledger at a time. It's one or the other but not both. Is it possible to do allow both?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Run Revenue recognition - Projects job - Is it possib...
entry.content:
https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3453393

Cause

With the current design it is not foreseen and would require special consideration with respect to shifted fiscal years. In this case you have to look at the combination of ledger and the "To Fiscal Year Period", and it is not simply possible to provide a multi-select of ledgers.

Resolution

Suggest you to raise feature request and collect likes. See KBA 2963059.

entry.title: Re: transfer data from to FI with BTE technic
entry.content:
Dear All,
I do not recommend the good practice says that only ZZ client fields should be inserted, incorporating a standard field, since they may conflict with fields associated with tables behind or future SAP updates could incorporate these fields.

entry.title: Need to send invoice output print to customer but only after IRN is generated successfully
entry.content:
Hello there,

Client requirement is to send invoice output to customer by email, but only after IRN is generated successfully.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need to send invoice output print to customer but onl...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

You can consider if this could be realized by Output Relevance in Output Parameter Determination app. 

Output Parameter Determination | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: [Question[ Parameter system/usage_flavour
entry.content:
Dear amontella96,

thanks a lot for your reply! Could you kindly what exactly does the parameter influence for scheduling Fiori jobs ?
I know that it is obsolete, but I couldn't find anywhere some explanation, hence I became really curious 🙂 Thank you!

entry.title: How to Export BPC Excel Reports by Tool or Scripts
entry.content:
Dear Sir/Madam,

In a new Financial year, Management urgently want last 10 years' BPC Excel reports for making decision. However they will be thousands reports that cannot be manually exported and very time consuming. We want to know that How to Export BPC Excel Reports by Tool or Scripts? Pls advise.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to Export BPC Excel Reports by Tool or Scripts
entry.content:
Hello

I feel the question is a little confusing. Because BPC data are kept in the backend instead of front end reports. If you haven't archived the data of the last 10 years in your backend BW, your managers can login to EPM reports and select the previous years 'periods as the "Time" dimension to display any data and you don't need to export your EPM reports.

In addition, from BPC standard features, there is no such scripts or tools to export reports as a batch. There is no such need too.

entry.title: Re: [Problem]: <SID> is not a consolidation target
entry.content:
Thanks for your reply, amontella96,

- yes, of course I made the modifications in the transport domain controller and I saw them in place. Otherwise it's not possible to make such changes.

- No, I did not create a transport target group. 

From the link you sent me - the last thing which I didn't do was as a former member suggests:

After creating a request in PRD system, You have to create layer between PRD and the Target system. Then only you can. 

Please kindly let me know your opinion. Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Prefilling Fields When Creating a New Entity with CAP Node.js
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ! 

First thanks for this very helpful blog!

I have a similar requirement, I need to pre-fill values when creating a new entity (having draft enable) the difference is that the data that I need to pre-fill is a composition of many in a second level hierarchy (a grand-child entity), I need to default the grand-child entity information once the child node is created.

I tried to create the draft in the handler when  the child is created, trying to fill the grand-child entities using the  "this.send:" query that you have explained here, but I get an error "A draft can only be modified via its root entity", any idea how to pre-fill/create the draft for sub-entities?

Thanks

entry.title: Segmentation fault (core dumped) error while applying Oracle Bundle Patch on AIX
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Today I was implementing an Oracle bundle patch on 12.2.0.1 on an AIX 7.1 server. MOpatch went fine. But afterward, when I tried to execute the catsbp.sh script, it keeps giving Segmentation fault (core dumped) and it keeps creating errpt entries with Signal number 11 and failing process perl.

I tried to copy a newer version of perl to the Server, but I somehow realized, that catsbp.sh is not invoking perl from the OS, but from $ORACLE_HOME/perl/bin

What I tried as well was to compare the ulimit of the oracle user:

% ulimit -a
time(seconds) unlimited
file(blocks) unlimited
data(kbytes) unlimited
stack(kbytes) 4194304
memory(kbytes) 32768
coredump(blocks) unlimited
nofiles(descriptors) 32768
threads(per process) unlimited
processes(per user) unlimited

with another server. The other server had an even smaller value for stack.

I kept searching everywhere, but it seems that I am the only person ever had this error... Please advise how to solve it. Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: URI is malformed while launching the content in SuccessFactor LMS
entry.content: Hello @SubbuArumugam, can you please provide more details? Is there a special character in the filename of item or pdf?

entry.title: Information spelunking - When you must read the source, Luc.
entry.content:
A few weeks ago I related a work-flow tale that had a partial germ in a stack of (blank) punch cards from early IT days with the title "information archeology". Then a week ago an open source integrity issue appeared in the news as an intrusion in a common archive protocol repository. Meanwhile, as I continued digging through an accumulation of magnetic media I noticed a backup protocol I had not seen before.

Amidst other standard "DOS format" floppies from the 1990s, a set like the one pictured here were hand-labelled with the contents, and the storage method, cryptically written as "fpio -0.".

The author used GNU tar, on an AT&T UNIX system, but instead of tar used in the literal sense of a tape archive, The first line says "3b1/source (gnu)" which looked a bit like a Usenet group as the provenance for the origin of the code. Except the paper listing indicates what was stored were primarily compiled binaries, not source text (not the "*" below indicating executable).

In the top level directory, there is a UNIX compressed (not GNU gz'd) archive file called "gzip-bin.tar.Z" and an executable named gnutar. The only other file at the root is "0.index" which is what the printout shows (highly probably).

In the ./bin directory are compress/uncompress utilities from  the open source GNU project. Hopefully you will guess why there is gzip and gunzip, but only uncompress, not compress. There may be no files in either info/ or man/.

 My earliest recollection of "production" backup to tape protocols was whether one would use the (a) tape archive tools, or (b) the cpio alternative, with the difference attributable to "this one comes from Bell Labs in New Jersey" and "this one comes from Berkeley, California." I had not heard the method of treating a floppy disk like a single-stream write/read cycle, like the reel-to-reel mag tapes you see in 60's spy movies, because the commonly adopted schemes were random or direct I/O instead.

"cpio" standing for Copy In Out, my favorite set of options had the mnemonic "poodle move" but was spelled "-pdlmuv" that worked best. Could we read an fpio-formatted disk these days? Stay tuned...

entry.title: Re: SQL LTRIM version?
entry.content: Tuncay, Thanks for your post. That is just an example. The original SQL sentence is a little longer. In text sample @factura is an external variable (already defined). In the image, which I sent in order to show that the editor does not recognize the ltrim function, “belnrp” is a field of the zfihistmed table, so it was written without the @ symbol. So, in both cases, be either with an external variable or with a table column, the function does not work. Regards , Luis

entry.title: Re: How to find an archiving object for a table in S/4HAN...
entry.content: Hi Enda, thanks for replying. Same recognition with you.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cloud: oAuth2 API call
entry.content: I also have the same type of question. I have a scenario working via OAUTH in POSTMAN - I followed Pascal's blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/maintain-assignment-of-document-info-record-to-maintenance-task-lists-via/ba-p/13574370 but the IAS and S4HC scope popups are going to get in the way when a 3rd Party app wants to call our S4HC APIs. Did you get around that ? If so could you share?.

entry.title: FINS_ACDOC_PLANNING 009 Category doesn't exist and FINS_ACDOC_CUST602
entry.content:
in creating PM WO via IW31, by entering figure in "Duration" after saving receiving error message FINS_ACDOC_PLANNING 009 and WO got generated with CSER status

regardless of the duration, in Confirmation processing, IW41, by entering figure in "Actual Work" will receive error FINS_ACDOC_CUST 602, No valid Business Transaction Category: RMRU

our system engineer tried installing SNote#https://me.sap.com/notes/3269873 but error message, not valid for our S4/Hana 2022

FYI, I have already added PLANORD03 for Maintenance Plan Order in SPRO.

can anyone help me on this subject how to overcome?

PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) 

@Neeraj_Jain 

thanks

Mary

entry.title: Crystal Reports Server - Restful API & Parameters
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm encountering a challenge while attempting to generate a transient report on our Crystal Server. The report, originally created with Crystal Reports Designer, works flawlessly when accessed through the BI interface. It prompts for a parameter, and upon receiving it, generates the report without any hitches.

However, the problem arises when I try to execute this same report through the RESTful API, aiming to pass the necessary parameter. Instead of the expected outcome, I'm met with generic error messages.



Failed to create report instance. Status code: InternalServerError
Response: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<error>
    <error_code>RWS 00070</error_code>
    <message>Internal server error. (RWS 00070)</message>
</error>

I opted for the RESTful API over the Crystal Reports SDK because our setup doesn't utilize the runtime environment. The goal is to enable internal report generation across various computers seamlessly.

Here is my code from VS 2022

using System;
using System.Linq;
using System.Net.Http;
using System.Net.Http.Headers;
using System.Text;
using System.Threading.Tasks;
using System.Xml.Linq;

class Program
{
    static readonly HttpClient client = new HttpClient();

    static async Task Main(string[] args)
    {
        string baseUri = "http://servername.local:8080/biprws";
        string username = "user";
        string password = "password";
        string reportId = "6380";
        int pickslipNumber = 615710;

        string logonToken = await AuthenticateAndGetLogonToken(baseUri, username, password);
        if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(logonToken))
        {
            Console.WriteLine("Authentication failed.");
            return;
        }
        Console.WriteLine($"Authentication successful. Logon Token: {logonToken}");

        await CreateReportInstance(baseUri, reportId, logonToken, pickslipNumber);
    }

    static async Task<string> AuthenticateAndGetLogonToken(string baseUri, string username, string password)
    {
        string authUrl = $"{baseUri}/logon/long";
        var authPayload = $"<attrs xmlns='http://www.sap.com/rws/bip'>" +
                          $"<attr name='userName' type='string'>{username}</attr>" +
                          $"<attr name='password' type='string'>{password}</attr>" +
                          $"<attr name='auth' type='string' possibilities='secEnterprise,secLDAP,secWinAD'>secEnterprise</attr>" +
                          $"</attrs>";

        HttpContent content = new StringContent(authPayload, Encoding.UTF8, "application/xml");

        var response = await client.PostAsync(authUrl, content);

        if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
        {
            var data = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
            return ExtractLogonToken(data);
        }

        return null;
    }

    static string ExtractLogonToken(string xmlResponse)
    {
        var xDoc = XDocument.Parse(xmlResponse);
        XNamespace ns = "http://www.sap.com/rws/bip";
        var logonTokenElement = xDoc.Descendants(ns + "attr").FirstOrDefault(x => x.Attribute("name")?.Value == "logonToken");
        return logonTokenElement?.Value;
    }

    static async Task CreateReportInstance(string baseUri, string reportId, string logonToken, int pickslipNumber)
    {
        string url = $"{baseUri}/infostore/{reportId}/rpt/instance";

        string requestBody = $@"<feed xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2005/Atom'>
                                <title type='text'>Crystal Reports New Instance</title>
                                <entry>
                                    <title type='text'>SuppressData</title>
                                    <content type='application/xml'>
                                        <attrs>
                                            <attr name='value' type='boolean'>false</attr>
                                        </attrs>
                                    </content>
                                </entry>
                                <entry>
                                    <title type='text'>Report Parameter</title>
                                    <id>PickslipNumber</id>
                                    <content type='application/xml'>
                                        <attrs>
                                            <attr name='value' type='number'>{pickslipNumber}</attr>
                                        </attrs>
                                    </content>
                                </entry>
                            </feed>";

        HttpContent content = new StringContent(requestBody, Encoding.UTF8, "application/xml");

        client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Clear();
        client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Add("X-SAP-LogonToken", $"\"{logonToken}\"");

        var response = await client.PostAsync(url, content);

        if (response.IsSuccessStatusCode)
        {
            string instanceId = await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync();
            Console.WriteLine($"Report instance created successfully. Instance ID: {instanceId}");
        }
        else
        {
            Console.WriteLine($"Failed to create report instance. Status code: {response.StatusCode}");
            Console.WriteLine($"Response: {await response.Content.ReadAsStringAsync()}");
        }
    }
}

Any insights or suggestions to overcome these errors would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: How to make a field in SAP Sales order Va02 as a non...
entry.content: VA02 is a GUI released into SAP Fiori, so you can apply an SD userexit. Another method with some research is Screen Personas which is really a nice tool to use in Fiori. Regards Warren

entry.title: Need Guidance to develop app at S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

   We have S4Hana public cloud license. We have an existing system at ECC where there are many customized ABAP based development which uses selection screens, Ztable and BAPIs, BDC etc. 

We would like to develop similar app at S4Hana Public cloud from scratch. We are beginner to such development. Although there are many references in the community and SAP help but it is adding more confusion. We would like to be focus by understanding step by step guidance which gives us idea of development. 

We would like to know best approach to achieve our goal. We have below questions:-

  • Which programming model to be preferred? - CAP or RAP
  • As it is totally cloud environment, How to create ZTables or custom objects?
  • How to store data, retrieve data from Z or Standard tables? 
  • Which development IDE and environment to be preferred?
  • How to retrieve and display data on Fiori based frontend. The records will be also added/ modified through same frontend.
  • How to use APIs?

Please excuse for lame questions if any. Appreciate your expert guidance.

Regards,

OD

entry.title: S4 HANA Public Cloud - How to enable calculated fields in Data source extensions (Custom fields App)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Does anyone know how to enable calculated fields in Data Source extensions (Custom Fields App)?
This is for "Supplier line items". Thank you!



Just a brief background of the requirement, they ask to add a field in 'Manage Supplier line items' app
wherein it will calculate the difference of the 2 highlighted dates. Thank you so much

 

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud 

Regards,
Ivan

Does anyone know how to achieve this?

The logic is same with settings for Manager. Please refer to this KBA: 3317132 - People Selector in Goal Management Page does not show Manager user's Direct Reports

entry.title: Re: Incorrect documentation regarding "Error Sanitization"?
entry.content:
Hello Gregor,

I have the same issue as you had in the past - locally the error message is shown properly on the SAP Fiori app, but in production (on BTP) the generic internal server error appears.

Was it possible to solve it in your case and if yes, could you please provide some small instructions on how you fixed it?

Thank you very much,

Cata

entry.title: Re: ABAP RUNTIME ERROR WHEN RUNNING THE ME2J report
entry.content:
Hi,

There can be multiple reasons for runtime error, but assuming that the data you are requesting is having huge number of entries, please try with some additional filters. 
You can specify plant, document type, document date, year. You can also filter for specific date ranges. 
If still there is same runtime error, then additional details about the runtime error might help to understand the issue.

entry.title: BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN - CREATED RESERVATION
entry.content:
hello experts! I try to create Order in RFC use bapi BAPI_ALM_ORDER_MAINTAIN. it's successfully created but i have problem in reservation. 
I found a problem in the order details, when I checked Components -> General Data -> Reservation Details there was a difference in MovementType as in the picture below.
Why does this happen?
for movementType that complies with the company's rules in Y19, why in the source stored data table is MvTp 261? what should i do?

note: in it_component when use BAPI, I did not enter the reservation number (RESERV_NO). the system/bapi created it automatically.

The suggestions or answers you gave really helped me. Thanks A lot!

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Exploring Integration Options in SAP Datasphere with the focus on using SAP extractors
entry.content:
This blog came so late considering the lack of information available in SAP standard documentation about the consumption of S-API extractor into the Datasphere; nevertheless, it is an important and helpful blog post. Particularly, Tables 1-5 are very handy for checking S-API-based data source settings.

I have one question though -

I have one generic extractor based on VBAK and VBELN is not a key.

But I don't see a provision in the extract structure where I can mark it as a key. Because of this I cannot use delta functionality via remote tables in Datasphere.

Thanks again for this blog post!

Regards,

Mandar

entry.title: Updating Application in Infostructure
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am trying to update the application to 01 in infostructure s821 but the application field is greyed out in MC22.

Can someone please help me with this and advise what I need to do once the changes have been done since the issue is escalated.

Thanks and Regards.

entry.title: Re: Special Delivery for item category
entry.content: You have not explained what the Business requirement is.  You should be knowing that for any Business requirement, as a functional consultant, you need to understand what the Business requirement is and accordingly, it can be addressed in multiple ways.  Having said that, since you mentioned only about item category, it is not possible to restrict with standard configuration.  Instead of hard coding, maintain these item categories in TVARVC table and with a Delivery exit, system should check this table and compare with VBAP and if both found, trigger an error.

I am confident that the knowledge and insights gained from this certification will enable me to make meaningful contributions to my projects.

Looking forward for your favorable reply please.

Thanks & Regards,
Ujaleswar

Normally whem I create the sale order item + Real Internal Order in sale Item when I do the billing the revenue will go to Internal Order. But if Iwould like the SAP to flow the date to CO-PA like 'Statistic Internal Order'. How can I do. Previsously my ababper told me to create the user exit to pass the data flow to CO-PA. Can anybody recommend?  Or sugguset what the effect will be.

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Fioriにおけるクリックの制御について
entry.content:
コミュニティ利用ありがとうございます。
SAP Build Process Automation の RPA ではなさそうなので、実際の製品を明記したほうが回答を得られやすいです。また、この Web 画面では この javascript でできたけど、 Fiori だと同じ用にうまくいかない、など切り分け情報があると、回答側がどこが問題かコメントしやすいです。

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud-Account Based Model
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I have created an account-based model where all the calculated measures are in the account dimension. There are some formulae with IF and LOOKUP functions in a single formula. The problem is that all such formulae aren't working in the account dimension, but they were working previously as calculated measures. Once I remove the IF function, the formulae start working but when added with LOOKUP, it doesn't work. 

Can some please help me out with this.

TIA

entry.title: Re: Certificate which I am looking forward to complete is...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The certificates required by the Solution Manager system can be downloaded from KBA 2631190 - Download location of SSL certificates required for Support Hub Connectivity configuration - SAP Solution Manager.

For the other certificates required by different applications, it needs to be checked with the application teams. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Removing NULL from SAP CPI mapping - context
entry.content:
Dear @das_sappo,

Could you please explain why you want to do this. My understanding is that this, having NULL in the first row, is normal. You cannot remove it. It represents the previous value when the context changed. For the first change there is no previous value. So it is always NULL. 

Perhaps you should take a step back and look at why you thought it necessary to remove the NULL. 

See Set the Mapping Context | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: hi I want block a tax without posting into customer b...
entry.content: as per above image Line 1 = Line 2+ line 3 + line item 4 the requirement is Line 1 = line 3 + line item 4 but Line item 2 need to post into relevant tax GL

Now I want to remove the delivery completion indicator but it showing Target value get exceeded by 1500 rs

Please help to resolve

entry.title: Re: Regarding restrictions when referring to document typ...

For example, I am concerned about whether there are any restrictions, such as journal entries entered using "SC" not being output to the income statement or to the consumption tax report app.

entry.title: The Role of Supply Chain Management in Ensuring Product Quality and Safety
entry.content:
Supply chain management plays a crucial role in ensuring product quality and safety throughout the entire production and distribution process. Here's how:

Supplier Selection and Qualification: Supply chain management begins with selecting reliable and reputable suppliers. By thoroughly vetting suppliers and assessing their quality control measures, companies can minimize the risk of receiving substandard materials or components that could compromise product quality and safety.

Quality Assurance Standards: Supply chain managers establish and enforce rigorous quality assurance standards and protocols to maintain consistency and integrity across all stages of production. This includes conducting regular inspections, audits, and testing to identify and rectify any deviations or non-conformities.

Traceability and Transparency: Implementing traceability systems enables companies to track the movement of raw materials, components, and finished products throughout the supply chain. This transparency allows for swift identification and containment of any quality or safety issues, reducing the risk of widespread recalls or customer harm.

Risk Management Strategies: Supply chain managers develop comprehensive risk management strategies to proactively address potential threats to product quality and safety. This may involve diversifying suppliers, establishing contingency plans, and conducting risk assessments to identify vulnerabilities and implement preventive measures.

Collaboration and Communication: Effective communication and collaboration among all stakeholders in the supply chain are essential for ensuring product quality and safety. Supply chain managers facilitate open channels of communication between suppliers, manufacturers, distributors, and regulatory authorities to promptly address any concerns or issues that may arise.

Continuous Improvement Initiatives: Supply chain management is a dynamic process that requires ongoing monitoring, evaluation, and improvement. By fostering a culture of continuous improvement, companies can identify areas for optimization, enhance quality control measures, and respond proactively to changing market dynamics and regulatory requirements.

Compliance with Regulatory Standards: Supply chain managers ensure compliance with relevant regulatory standards and requirements governing product quality and safety. This includes staying abreast of evolving regulations, maintaining accurate records, and implementing best practices to mitigate compliance risks.

Customer Feedback and Satisfaction: Supply chain management is ultimately geared towards meeting customer expectations and satisfaction. By soliciting and incorporating customer feedback into quality improvement initiatives, companies can enhance their reputation, build trust, and foster long-term loyalty.

Supply chain management plays a multifaceted role in ensuring product quality and safety by establishing robust quality assurance processes, promoting transparency and traceability, managing risks effectively, fostering collaboration and communication, driving continuous improvement, and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards. By prioritizing quality and safety throughout the supply chain, companies can safeguard their reputation, mitigate risks, fedex operational delay, and deliver superior products that meet or exceed customer expectations.

entry.title: Re: Open SAP GUI in separate window with AIE
entry.content: Hi @ThFiedler , will this option also be available for Mac any time?

entry.title: Re: How to Export BPC Excel Reports by Tool or Scripts
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check if the book publication is what you are looking for. https://help.sap.com/docs/EPM_ADDIN/ec68e48b18a44a49abb12b8ee8ae306f/f9b6c2976faf1014878bae8cb0e91070.html

Best regards,
Amy

entry.title: Re: How to check runtime CR 13 with SP 25 installed from...
entry.content: Sorry, I misunderstood that. I assumed you need to determine which runtime you have to install. I would simply check the installation folder. The runtime is installed in %programfiles(x86)%\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Common\SAP BusinessObjects Enterprise XI 4.0. Depending on the version, you will find a subfolder win32_x86 or win64_x64 there.

entry.title: [Ariba]PR Approval Workflow_Conditions that distinguish between direct PRs and PRs created from RFQs
entry.content:
For the approval workflow for Ariba PRs, we would like to further configure the noncatalog to distinguish between 'direct PRs' and 'PRs created from RFQs'.

Right now, I distinguish whether the detail item RfqId is blank (direct PR) or not blank (PR created from RFQ).
Until about a month ago, we were able to distinguish correctly, but since the other day, this condition has not been functioning properly, and PRs created from RFQs are also recognized as having blank RfqId.
So, we would like to know if it is appropriate to use this RfqId condition when originally making such a distinction, or if there is another item that can be used to distinguish them.


Currently, a candidate proposal is to use "OriginatingSystem" as a condition, and if it is blank, identify it as a direct PR, and if it is not blank, identify it as a PR created from the RFQ, but I would also like to know if this is appropriate.

Thanks,
Itsumi Yamada

entry.title: Re: How to get all sernr of material at specific lgort
entry.content:
Not sure what are you talking about.
I found record at OBJK by filtering matnr and sernr
Put the value of OBKNR inro SER03
Get last MBLNR and put it into MSEG
Material sent to the same LGORT, which i want to get all the SERNRS from
But the are no values in EQBS.

entry.title: Re: SQL LTRIM version?
entry.content: ​​Please post the code as text instead of image, so that one can easily answer by copying your code in order to complete it. Press the buttons "..." and "</>" and paste your code, which makes the code appear colored/indented. It will be easier for people to look at it. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I hope you're well.

My colleague @ujaleswar , and I are new team members, eager to delve into SAP CAPM/Fiori. Despite being newcomers, we are enthusiastic about expanding our knowledge in SAP technologies. We view this opportunity as a pivotal moment in our professional journey, presenting a chance to grow within our roles and contribute meaningfully to the SAP community.

I believe that obtaining certification in SAP CAPM/Fiori will equip me with essential skills and insights needed to excel in my current projects and make valuable contributions to my team and beyond. my commitment to learning and dedication to roles drive me to pursue this certification diligently.

I am genuinely excited about the potential impact this certification can have on my career and  eager to embark on this learning journey. Your support and guidance in this endeavor would be greatly appreciated.

Looking forward to your response.

Warm regards,

Sunil Kumar Padhy

entry.title: Re: SQL LTRIM version?
entry.content: You need to place one space after ( and one space before ). Also, I think that the function must be on the left side of the operator.

entry.title: How to generate a Hyperlink to another Story within a custom Widget in SAC?
entry.content:
Hey, 

I tried to create a HTML link to another story within a custom widget. Unfortunatly that doesn't work. 
If you create a hyperlink in a text field within a story you can link both external websites and stories. 

I took the corresponding <a>...</a> HTML elements form my browsers inspector and used them in a custom widget.

Of course, the external URLs work as expected, but the links to stories are not so easy to copy.

Does anyone know how to create a hyperlink to a story or story page in a custom widget? 

Alternatively, it would also work if i could create a hyperlink within the SAC using a script. 

Unfortunately, so far I've only been able to find the option to add a hyperlink using the "three-dot menu". 

Best regards

Felix

entry.title: Re: Partitioning based on Change Number Range
entry.content:
Hi,
Please try these two things:
1. Be aware that you also need to define the initial parameter. This can be e.g. queried from CDHDR table based on UDATE column by taking the minimum changenr from CDHDR from the date you want to extract your data from:

parameters:
- name: changenr
initial: '0000000001'

 

2. If you get less data then expected, try to increase your pagesize. In rare occasions the extraction might stop because there is a gap in the changenumbers based on you filter criteria. Hence the extraction stops due to not finding additional records based your defined pagesize. 

In your case I suppose changing the initial value might help. Maybe from range 0000000001 to 0000100000 there are no changes on your database due to archiving reasons.

Best regards
Daniel

entry.title: Re: Strategy group and availability check on make to Orde...
entry.content:
Hi,

For RM net requirement to consider the available unrestricted stock also, then the RM stock shouldn’t be managed as sales order stock. Therefor for the RM, in the material master MRP4 view, set the individual/coll indicator as 2.

For an example for FG you can use strategy group as 20, and for RM, no strategy group but set individual/coll indicator as 2.

entry.content: Hello thanks for sharing the information . i have tried the above steps for full pallet picking . but i am not able to pick the entire pallet. it is picking partial pallet and also from other bin . i need the full picking of 360 quatantity. which is avalible in my bin. but rather then picking full pallet it is picking individual quantity from other bins and creating 5 WT rather than 1 WT for 360

entry.title: SAP BPA Decision - Rules editor is not launching
entry.content:
Hi all

I am facing an error in creating decisions in SAP Business Process Automation service, The rules editor does not open when I click on 'Add Rule' button.

There are some errors in the browser console which I have provided in the attached file and down below in this post.

Note: It was working before, suddenly started getting this error today and even the existing rules won't load.

I have added the input and output parameters and saved,

Now, I click on 'Add Rule' button and nothing happens

This is what I see in the browser logs, (I have attached the log file with the post)

Thanks in advance.

Deepak

entry.title: Re: Is PPM supported in S/4 PPDS
entry.content:
Hi Damin,

if you just upgrade your ECC to to an S4 system and you still use and SCM APO system 7.1X version then yes.

If you upgrade to S4 and use the ePPDS application then no.

br

entry.title: Turn off automatic batch determination
entry.content:
Hi All,

So we get order from our sales team.

and when i use order number on va02 and click on delivery. the outbound generates, and the items comes with predetermined batch. our customer need deferent batch for each order doesn't follow FIFO. So is there a way to turn it off . or delete all the batches from Outbound at once.

please comment if you don't understand the question.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: CBTA Edge issue
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to suggest you to check the following first:

1. Make sure to use the latest CBTA version which can be downloaded from SAP ONE Support Launchpad

2. If the security settings from your company are blocking the browsers from using unpacked extensions. Follow the resolution from KBA:3351451 - CBTA - Loading of unpacked extensions is disabled by the administrator.

3. Check if you have Edge ALREADY OPENED on your session when running the CBTA Execution/Recording. If yes, please close it.

If the issue still persists, you can raise an incident with issue details under the component SV-SMG-TWB-CBT.

entry.title: Re: CAP CDS Annotations for Sorting
entry.content: Have you found a way to fix this issue?

entry.title: Re: Question on Solution Manager 7.2 CCLM User CC_ALL_SID
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: CIF error : Location doesn't exist for external locat...
entry.content:
you should list check in the SCM system if that location is not there at all.

--> run /N/SAPAPO/LOC3

--> if the location not there then you need to transfer the same via the imodel first.

--> in case there is already and active model and the plant is not transferred then you need to force the transfer via CFM) or report RIMODINI. That can happen because some queues where delete and the imodel was still getting activated without saved the location data in SCM.

--> if the location is there please check the loctyp a plant can not a loctype 1001 or 1002. If you change that in ECC and not the SCM then the location is not found because the loctyp is a keyfield in the selection

entry.title: Re: Issue opening PDF attachment in ITSM
entry.content: From the information you originally shared we're unable to provide a helpful answer as more details are needed. As some time has passed and this question might not be relevant for you anymore, please feel free to submit a new question with more details if you would like someone to have a closer look at this further.

entry.title: Re: ASCS pse certificates expiration monitoring
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no updates after 7 days. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One V10 SQL API
entry.content:
Hi RuanDuPreez,

If you have installed Service Layer correctly, the link to access it will appear in the Services tab of System Landscape Directory (SLD).

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: When installing the 32 bit DI API installer, it is no...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

You can proceed as below:

Open Command Prompt (cmd) as Administrator and navigate to the DI API installation path in cmd such as: C:\Program Files <x86>\SAP\SAP Business One DI API\DI API 90.

Run the command: regsvr32 SAPbobsCOM90.dll

Once you will run the command, it will give you the message that it has been registered or added.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: SLT Job Status
entry.content: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-US/4b/308aa91dd90a93e10000000a421937/content.htm?no_cache=true

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Backoffice - Redirect to specific url or...
entry.content:
You can extend DefaultSessionCloseStrategy and override the following method

public void closeSessionInHttpSession(HttpSession session)

You can execute your custom code before or after calling the super method.

Actually, this strategy is where the timeout is defined for the session with the property backoffice.session.timeout via setTimeoutOnHttpSessionCreation and trySettingExtensionSpecificTimeout methods. 

In you custom code, you can get the extension name as follows and if it's equal to "backoffice" you can execute your logic

Tenant tenant = this.getCurrentTenant(httpSession);
String webApp = httpSession.getServletContext().getContextPath();
String extensionName = Utilities.getExtensionForWebroot(webApp, tenant.getTenantID());

Hope this helps,

entry.title: ODATA V4 RAP - How to retrieve messages in response
entry.content:
Spoiler
 

Dear Support.

We want to call an api created on RAP ( Odata V4).  We read information about our question here https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/fbe1cb5613cf4a40a841750bf813238e.html and here https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/b9a77576783a455cbff617c497f2ed59.html

Upon appending messages in failed messages, they are correctly displayed in the response payload. However, when we append information or success messages in the reported section, for example:

 

 

Messages are included in the response header, with a limitation of 20 records.

 

 

But not in response payload

Is there any chance to report messages in the response payload? How are then appended the messages?

Regards

entry.title: Crystal report has built in export options?
entry.content: I am used angular 16 as front end and backend is .Net web API . i want display the crystal report in angular and also needed built in export options.(i want to export as excel , word, pdf, etc... like Kendo UI). is that possible? . if it is possible then what are the steps

entry.title: Re: Model concept in SAC considering connection with S4 HANA
entry.content: @christophtill Thank you Christoph I read the refernce that you provided me. Then trying to summarize pro/con of approach#1 and #2. About approach#2, I have a conecern about Pottential risk of data discrepancy of each models due to time rag of interfaces from S4. While interfacing huge data to each models in SAC, if some data changed in S4, I guess it might be the risk of data discrepancy of models. (ex. Start IF to Revenue model->Finish IF to Revenue model->Data changed in S4->Start IF to OPEX model) When I consider the point, is it better to take approach#1? Or any function to secure data consistency? Best regards,

entry.title: Re: Model concept in SAC considering connection with S4 HANA
entry.content:
@christophtill

Thank you Christoph

I read the reference that you provided me.
Then trying to summarize pro/con of approach#1 and #2.

 

About approach#2, I have a concern about Potential risk of data discrepancy of each models due to time rag of interfaces from S4.
While interfacing huge data to each models in SAC, if some data changed in S4, I guess it might be the risk of data discrepancy of models.
(ex. Start IF to Revenue model->Finish IF to Revenue model->Data changed in S4->Start IF to OPEX model)

 

When I consider the point, is it better to take approach#1?
Or any function to secure data consistency?

Best regards,

entry.title: Nächster Stammtisch mit ein oder zwei/drei 20minütigen Sessions?
entry.content:
Hi,

was hält ihr davon, wenn wir beim nächsten Stammtisch in Wien zwei/drei 15/20minütigen Sessions (Präsentation, Demo, ... ) machen? Jedes ABAP relevante Thema willkommen. Danach wie üblich Speis, Trank und Diskussion. Wünschenswert wären Themen, die zur Diskussion anregen könnten.

Dann würde ich versuchen eine Location zu organisieren wo wir das machen können. (Zur Not bei uns im Office - dann ins Gasthaus)

Grober Plan könnte sein:

18:00 - 19:00 Uhr 3x Sessions
19:00 - 19:30 Bier
19:30 - ...  Abendessen 

Eure Meinung?

lg Föß

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Integration Looping Process Call
entry.content: You are welcome @rasjoshi  CPI max gives this much as a limit. It shouldn't be a case with 9999 iterations anyway. There will be many problems in terms of performance anyway, it will be a very tiring and long process for CPI. So if it reaches the upper limit you won't be able to retrieve the remaining data.
